app_engine_http_target.description: Defines the configuration for App Engine HTTP target, specifying the App Engine service and HTTP path to invoke for the job.
app_engine_http_target.type: list(object({body: optional(string),headers: optional(map(string)),http_method: optional(string),relative_uri: string,app_engine_routing: list(object({instance: optional(string),service: optional(string),version: optional(string)}))}))

attempt_deadline.description: Specifies the maximum duration for a job attempt, must be between 15 seconds and 30 minutes.

description.description: Defines the description of the Cloud Scheduler job, providing details about its purpose or functionality; must not exceed 500 characters.

http_target.description: Defines the HTTP target configuration for the Cloud Scheduler job, specifying the URL, HTTP method, headers, and optional payload for the HTTP request.
http_target.type: list(object({body: optional(string),headers: optional(map(string)),http_method: optional(string),uri: string,oauth_token: list(object({scope: optional(string),service_account_email: string})),oidc_token: list(object({audience: optional(string),service_account_email: string}))}))

name.description: Unique identifier for the Cloud Scheduler job, must be between 1 and 500 characters and match the regex pattern `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+`.

paused.description: Indicates whether the Cloud Scheduler job is paused. When set to true, the job will not execute until unpaused.

pubsub_target.description: Specifies the Pub/Sub target configuration for the job, including the topic name and optional message payload.

retry_config.description: Defines the retry policy for failed job attempts, including maximum retry attempts and minimum retry interval.
retry_config.type: list(object({max_backoff_duration: optional(string),max_doublings: optional(number),max_retry_duration: optional(string),min_backoff_duration: optional(string),retry_count: optional(number)}))

schedule.description: Defines the frequency at which the job executes, using a cron expression or App Engine standard schedule format.

time_zone.description: Specifies the time zone for the job schedule, using IANA time zone identifiers (e.g., "America/New_York").

timeouts.description: Defines custom time durations for create, update, and delete operations for the Cloud Scheduler job.
